text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 52 

OIP_STAYS 

LABEL: Other Inpatient Stays 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the count of hospital stays (unique admissions, which may span more than one facility) in 
the non-acute inpatient setting for a given year. A non-acute inpatient stay is defined as a set of one or 
more consecutive non-acute inpatient claims where the beneficiary is only discharged on the most 
recent
